title: Actinobacteriophages: Genomics, Dynamics, and Applications.
author: Hatfull GF
content: S-EPMC8010332 PMC8010332 Actinobacteriophages: Genomics, Dynamics, and Applications. Actinobacteriophages are viruses that infect bacterial hosts in the phylum Actinobacteria. More than 17,000 actinobacteriophages have been described and over 3,000 complete genome sequences reported
